scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c green,blue "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.test:watch: concurrently -k -n backend-test,frontend-test -c green,blue "npm run test:watch --prefix backend" "npm run test:watch --prefix frontend"
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --prefix backend && npm run test:coverage --prefix frontend
